revision.comment: Added {{being deleted}} per [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2023 October 1#Template:Lx]] ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.13|XFDcloser]])
revision.text: {{Being deleted|2023 October 1|Template:Lx|merge=Template:Pagelinks}}[[{{{1}}}{{{2}}}]] ({{#if:{{{noedit|}}}||[{{fullurl:{{{1}}}{{{2}}}|action=edit}} edit] |}} {{#if:{{{notalk|}}}||[[{{{3}}}{{{5|:}}}{{{2}}}|{{{4}}}]] |}} {{#if:{{{nohistory|}}}||[{{fullurl:{{{1}}}{{{2}}}|action=history}} history] |}} {{#if:{{{nolinks|}}}||[{{fullurl:Special:Whatlinkshere/{{{1}}}{{{2}}}}} links] |}} {{#if:{{{nowatch|}}}||[{{fullurl:{{{1}}}{{{2}}}|action=watch}} watch] |}} {{#if:{{{nologs|}}}||[{{fullurl:Special:Log|page={{urlencode:{{{1}}}{{{2}}}}}}} logs]}}) {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
